title: 10 best herbal creams for taste changes
description: Silybum marianum, also known as milk thistle, creams helps with taste changes because they contain silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that supports liver health. The liver plays a crucial role in taste perception, and when it's functioning optimally, taste buds can detect flavors more accurately. By promoting liver detoxification and regeneration, Silybum marianum creams may help to restore a person's sense of taste, reducing the unpleasant changes in taste that can occur due to liver d...
